title: Cyberpunk 2077
description: In a dystopian future, explore the sprawling city of Night City as a mercenary on the rise.

title: Elden Ring
description: From the minds of Hidetaka Miyazaki and George R. R. Martin, enter a vast, intricately designed world of dark fantasy.

title: God of War: Ragnarök
description: Join Kratos and Atreus on an epic journey as they face down the gods of Norse mythology.

title: Hogwarts Legacy
description: Explore the wizarding world in the 1800s as a young witch or wizard in an open-world adventure.

title: Spider-Man: Miles Morales
description: Step into the shoes of Miles Morales and protect New York City in this high-stakes superhero adventure.

title: Assassin's Creed Valhalla
description: Venture into England's Dark Ages as a Viking in a world of epic battles and conquest.

title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare II
description: Join the legendary Task Force 141 in a new era of warfare in this action-packed shooter.

title: Hades
description: Battle your way out of the Underworld as Zagreus, son of Hades, in this rogue-like dungeon crawler.
